page_title: Zankoku na Tenshi no These MATSURI SPIRIT
text:
is a single by Yoko Takahashi. It was released on 24 July 2019 and was published by King Records via its label KING AMUSEMENT CREATIVE.
 https://vgmdb.net/album/87956 

Tracklist

Staff

Composition: Hidetoshi Sato
Lyrics: Neko Oikawa
Arrangements: Eitetsu Hayashi
Vocals: Yoko Takahashi
